gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/249)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/249)
text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ مَنْ خَرَجَ مِنَ الْحَرَمَيْنِ بَعْدَ ارْتِفَاعِ النَّهَارِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ الظُّهْرَ وَ الْعَصْرَ نُودِيَ مِنْ خَلْفِهِ لَا صَحِبَكَ اللَّهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Abdul Rahman Bin Hammad, from Ibrahim Bin Abdul Hameed who said,

‘I heard himasws saying: ‘The one who exits from the two Harrams after the rising of the day, before he has offered Salaat of Al-Zohr and Al Asr, would be Called to from behind him: ‘Allahazwj will not Accompany you!’’.
en.sarwar: 17. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn Hammad from Ibrahim ibn ‘Abd al-Hamid who has said the following: “I once heard him (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, ‘One who leaves one of the two al-Haram (the Sacred places) when the day is high before performing Salat (prayer) of al-Zuhr and al-‘Asr a caller will call from behind him, ‘May Allah not accompany you.’”
